mapper.select: SELECT sfid FROM (WITH TO_CHECK (sfid) AS (VALUES ${ids}) SELECT tc.sfid, NOT EXISTS (SELECT sfid FROM bankaccountinformationsync b WHERE b.sfid = tc.sfid) AS checked FROM to_check tc) AS t WHERE t.checked = #{checked}

SELECT b.sfid, b.account, b.appcompany, b.accountcategory, b.accountbank, b.accountnumber, b.accountname, b.accountnamekana, b.accounttype, b.invaliddate, b.invalidreason, b.lastmodifieddate FROM bankaccountinformation b WHERE(date_trunc('second', b.lastmodifieddate) >=${startTime}) ORDER BY b.sfid DESC OFFSET ${offset} LIMIT ${limit}

SELECT b.sfid, b.account, b.appcompany, b.accountcategory, b.accountbank, b.accountnumber, b.accountname, b.accountnamekana, b.accounttype, b.invaliddate, b.invalidreason FROM bankaccountinformationsync b WHERE b.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY b.sfid DESC
SELECT count(b.sfid) AS rows FROM bankaccountinformation b WHERE (date_trunc('second', b.lastmodifieddate) >= ${startTime})

SELECT b.sfid, b.account, b.appcompany, b.accountcategory, b.accountbank, b.accountnumber, b.accountname, b.accountnamekana, b.accounttype, b.invaliddate, b.invalidreason, b.lastmodifieddate FROM bankaccountinformation b WHERE b.sfid=#{id}

select ba.sfid, ba.account, ba.appcompany, ba.accountcategory, ba.accountbank, ba.accountnumber, ba.accountname, ba.accountnamekana, ba.accounttype, ba.invaliddate, ba.invalidreason, ba.lastmodifieddate, ba.appcompanyid from bankaccountinformation ba join bankmaster bm on ba.accountbank = bm.sfid where bm.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY ba.sfid DESC
SELECT b.sfid FROM bankaccountinformation b WHERE b.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY b.sfid DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bankaccountinformation (sfid, account, appcompany, accountcategory, accountbank, accountnumber, accountname, accountnamekana, accounttype, invaliddate, invalidreason, lastmodifieddate, appcompanyid) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{account}, #{appcompany}, #{accountcategory}, #{accountbank}, #{accountnumber}, #{accountname}, #{accountnamekana}, #{accounttype}, #{invaliddate}, #{invalidreason}, #{lastmodifieddate}, #{appcompanyid})
mapper.update: UPDATE bankaccountinformation SET account=#{account}, appcompany=#{appcompany}, accountcategory=#{accountcategory}, accountbank=#{accountbank}, accountnumber=#{accountnumber}, accountname=#{accountname}, accountnamekana=#{accountnamekana}, accounttype=#{accounttype}, invaliddate=#{invaliddate}, invalidreason=#{invalidreason}, lastmodifieddate=#{lastmodifieddate}, appcompanyid=#{appcompanyid} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bankaccountinformationsync (sfid, account, appcompany, accountcategory, accountbank, accountnumber, accountname, accountnamekana, accounttype, invaliddate, invalidreason, appcompanyid, syncedtime) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{account}, #{appcompany}, #{accountcategory}, #{accountbank}, #{accountnumber}, #{accountname}, #{accountnamekana}, #{accounttype}, #{invaliddate}, #{invalidreason}, #{appcompanyid}, #{syncedtime})
mapper.update: UPDATE bankaccountinformationsync SET account=#{account}, appcompany=#{appcompany}, accountcategory=#{accountcategory}, accountbank=#{accountbank}, accountnumber=#{accountnumber}, accountname=#{accountname}, accountnamekana=#{accountnamekana}, accounttype=#{accounttype}, invaliddate=#{invaliddate}, invalidreason=#{invalidreason}, appcompanyid=#{appcompanyid}, syncedtime=#{syncedtime} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
mapper.select: select a.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY sfid ) AS RowNum, * FROM bankaccountinformation ) AS a WHERE RowNum >= 1 AND RowNum <= 20 ORDER BY RowNum

SELECT bank.account, bm.banknamekana, bm.bankcode, bm.branchnamekana, bm.branchcode as branchCode, bank.accountname as accountName, bank.accountnumber, bank.accountnamekana, bank.accountcategory as accountCategory, bank.accounttype as accountType, acc.mertermno as mertermno FROM bankaccountinformationsync bank INNER JOIN bankmastersync bm ON bank.accountbank = bm.sfid LEFT JOIN accountsync acc ON bank.account = acc.sfid WHERE bank.account=#{accountId}
AND bank.accountcategory=#{accountCategory}
